plugins.name: mol
plugins.description: Project workflow skills for molcrafts repos, organized around the plannerâ†’generatorâ†’evaluator harness pattern. 21 skills (incl. bootstrap, impl-all, map) + 17 single-axis agents (incl. librarian) (producer-write / producer-return / reviewer kinds per rules/agent-design.md). /mol:bootstrap initializes and maintains the agent harness (CLAUDE.md + .claude/notes/ + .claude/specs/) â€” creates fresh when absent, audits and repairs when present. /mol:review is the unified static reviewer â€” takes --axis=<name> (arch/perf/docs/ux/api/science/numerics/visual/security/hygiene); /mol:simplify is the write-mode applier for janitor hygiene findings and enforces the language-canonical toolchain trio (ruff + ty / biome + tsc / cargo fmt + clippy + cargo check). Acceptance criteria carry a status ledger (pending â†’ verified / failed); /mol:impl parks specs at status: code-complete until runtime-typed criteria flip via /mol:web etc., only deleting the spec when every criterion is verified. Heavy drafting delegated to subagents (spec-writer for /mol:spec; debugger for /mol:debug + /mol:fix Step 2) to keep parent context small. Git chain /mol:pr â†’ /mol:push â†’ /mol:commit â†’ /mol:ship; follows GitHub fork convention (origin = fork, upstream = canonical) with no config â€” /mol:tag pushes release tags only to upstream. Adapts per project via mol_project frontmatter.

plugins.name: mol-plugin
plugins.description: Maintenance toolkit for the molcrafts marketplace itself. /mol-plugin:new-skill scaffolds a complete SKILL.md and registers it in the plugin README, /mol-plugin:check is the structural self-audit, /mol-plugin:janitor is the content self-audit (clarity, orthogonality, brevity across every SKILL.md and agent), /mol-plugin:release bumps all plugins to a single shared version and creates a local v<X.Y.Z> commit + tag (gated through /mol:ship commit; push the tag with /mol:tag).
